queries.question: Provide a list of all hotels and also provide a list of pods that cost 150.
queries.sql:
SELECT Hotels.Name 
FROM Hotels
WHERE Hotels.AccomodationType = "Hotel" OR Hotels.AccomodationType = "Pod" AND Hotels.Price = 150
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?hotels p:name ?name .
  ?hotels p:AccomodationType ?accomodationtype_w .
  ?hotels p:AccomodationType ?accomodationtype_w2 .
  ?hotels p:Price ?price_w .
  FILTER((STR(?accomodationtype_w) = "Hotel" || (STR(?accomodationtype_w2) = "Pod" && (STR(?price_w) = "150" || STR(?price_w) = "150.0"))))
}

queries.question: List all hotels and pods that cost 150.
queries.sql:
SELECT Hotels.Name 
FROM Hotels
WHERE (Hotels.AccomodationType = "Hotel" OR Hotels.AccomodationType = "Pod") AND Hotels.Price = 150
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?hotels p:name ?name .
  ?hotels p:AccomodationType ?accomodationtype_w .
  ?hotels p:AccomodationType ?accomodationtype_w2 .
  ?hotels p:Price ?price_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?accomodationtype_w) = "Hotel" || STR(?accomodationtype_w2) = "Pod")) && (STR(?price_w) = "150" || STR(?price_w) = "150.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all hotels and pods that cost 150.
